channel.title: Reinforcement-Learning on Larry Thul
channel.description: Recent content in Reinforcement-Learning on Larry Thul

item.title: Bringing LLM-Style RLVR to Time-Series Forecasting (Part 1)
item.description: Building a market forecaster from first principles as a discrete token policy, so the reinforcement learning that post-trains language models can post-train it to seek alpha.
